title: New Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# New Hypixel Skyblock A modpack for hypixel skyblock! Featuring all the best Hypixel Skyblock mods to improve your experience and be visually appealing! This modpack features 2 versions! [NORMAL] and [IRONMAN], select the one respective to your profile. Main skyblock mods this modpack features is: - Skyblocker - Skycubed - Skyblock Tweaks - Cookies mod - Firmament - Custom Scoreboard This modpack also obviously features optimization mods, and some visual mods that do not clash why the custom plugin on hypixel skyblock. Everything is configured for features to not clash and for them to work perfectly together. ## FAQ q: What is the difference between [NORMAL] and [IRONMAN]
a: Ironman has basically all features with the auction house and bazzar stripped and disabled from them as they are not at all needed. q: Why 1.21.3
a: Currently the most supported version by skyblock mods, will eventually switch to newer versions once those mods switch to it q: What texturepack do I use
a: There is an beta version of furfsky reborn, avalible on [their discord](https://discord.gg/fsr), Hypixel+ is another option, it sadly only supports CIT Resewn which has yet to update to this game version. Additionally, I recommend [rarity tooltips](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rarity-tooltips-for-hypixel-skyblock) ## Socials You can join my discord community to ask about this pack at https://discord.gg/hue
